response.justification: Strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective), Linux familiarity, and a relevant CS degree. However, the role is executive-level leadership requiring formal team lead/management experience, UML proficiency, and German at C1 — the candidate lists only basic German and no explicit leadership/mentoring track record, which are hard blockers for a Head of Development position in a German-speaking consultancy.
strengths: Extensive multi-stack software development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Demonstrated open-source leadership via founding GISCollective and active community teaching (workshops, talks, courses)
Solid Linux, architecture, and TDD/CI background aligned with the consultancy's engineering culture
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — falls well short of the required C1 proficiency
No explicit head-of-development or formal team-leadership experience; career is primarily senior IC
UML and formal requirements/architecture modeling experience not evidenced in resume

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership/management track record
Strong open-source and full-stack engineering background
